front: What is the story of the first peptide vaccine?
back: 1981: First synthetic peptide vaccine (malaria, Patarroyo). 1986: Hepatitis B recombinant vaccine. 1990s: Peptide vaccines faced challenges (immunogenicity, MHC restriction). 2020s: mRNA vaccines (SARS-CoV-2 spike protein) represent modern peptide antigen delivery. Peptide vaccines remain active area for cancer immunotherapy.
